productDisplayName: Hugo Boss Men Create EDT Perfume
description: The flacon of the hugo Create is a result of a prose contest in graphical painting by hugo boss. This limited edition piece's composition consists of green apple, lavender, mint and grapefruit in top notes. Carnation, sage and geranium middle notes on Hugo Create with pine tree and vetiver base notes creates this fab smell.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
